subject: feat(pwa): add Toast system, InstallInstructionsModal, updated PWA doc
body:
Toast system (Toast.jsx):
- Context-based ToastProvider + useToast hook, accessible from any component
- Stacking (newest on top), auto-dismiss with exit animation
- Four types: success (green), error (red), warning (yellow), info (themed)
- iOS safe area inset on container, pointer-events pass-through
- Replaced inline toast state in App.jsx with addToast() calls

InstallInstructionsModal (InstallInstructionsModal.jsx):
- Data-driven modal renders whatever getInstallInstructions() returns
- Focus-trapped (useFocusTrap), Escape to close (useEscapeKey)
- Benefits section explains WHY to install for non-technical users
- Numbered steps, optional warning note per browser

PWA install flow updated:
- pwa.js getInstallInstructions() returns { browser, steps, note }
  format (was { title, steps }) for richer modal content
- Added supportsNativeInstall() and supportsManualInstall() helpers
- Header.jsx shows install option for Safari/Firefox after 1s delay
  (was Chromium-only), opens InstallInstructionsModal instead of
  settings pane when native prompt unavailable

PWA_SYSTEM.md:
- Replaced with comprehensive cross-project reference from glow-props
- Covers: Vite config, install prompt race, SW updates, install
  detection, toast system, install modal, timer leaks, cache headers,
  ChunkLoadError prevention, platform gotchas
- Merged TIMER_LEAKS.md content (deleted standalone file)

CLAUDE.md:
- Added Toast, InstallInstructionsModal to component list
- Removed Timer Leaks row (merged into PWA System)
- Updated PWA System description

Tags: pwa, ui, a11y, documentation
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: medium
Debt: paid
Epic: cross-project-alignment
Semver: minor
